acquisition method: The MS was set in DDA mode with a cycle time of 1 s
alkylation reagent: containing 10 mM tris (2-carboxyethyl) phosphine hydrochloride, and 40 mM 2-chloro-acetamide
collision energy: fragmented with a HCD collision energy of 30%
fragmentation method: fragmented with a HCD collision energy of 30%
instrument: electro-sprayed directly into a Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid Mass Spectrometer
ionization type: peptides were electro-sprayed directly into a Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid Mass Spectrometer
